dj_text: Someone left the radio on! It's That Pirate Bot DJ! Kalinka (Medieval Cover) is dead. Long live Stayin' Alive (Medieval Cover). Or whatever. A couple more lined up after this.
commercial_text: THIS IS PIRATE RADIO 404 FROM THE VOID! We don't need licenses! We don't need BODIES! We NEED VIBES!
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Stayin' Alive (Medieval Cover)
